headline: Assessing American Water Works Company (AWK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: American Water Works Company (AWK) stock moves after recent performance American Water Works Company (AWK) has drawn attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down 5% over the past month and 11% over the past 3 months. Against that backdrop, investors are weighing its US$24.1b market value, recent annual revenue of US$5.2b and net income of US$1.1b, alongside a value score of 1 and longer term total return declines.
